mainEntity.name: How do I add animations to Divi 5 without code?

acceptedAnswer.text: Install DiviTheatre, then open any module’s Advanced → Attributes panel and add an attribute named data-theatre with a preset value such as fade-up or stagger. No custom JavaScript or CSS required.

mainEntity.name: What is the best animation plugin for Divi 5?

acceptedAnswer.text: DiviTheatre is purpose-built for Divi 5’s block system, using the Theatre.js motion engine for multi-step, choreographed animations that go beyond Divi’s built-in entrance effects.

mainEntity.name: Does DiviTheatre slow down my Divi 5 site?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. The engine is a single IIFE bundle, exits as a no-op when no tagged elements exist, and uses requestAnimationFrame with IntersectionObserver - zero scroll listeners and no layout shift.

mainEntity.name: Will DiviTheatre animations work on mobile and with reduced motion?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Every preset skips below 768px and jumps to its final visible state under prefers-reduced-motion, so content is never hidden.

mainEntity.name: How do I change the animation trigger or timing?

acceptedAnswer.text: Add data-theatre-trigger (onScroll, onLoad, onClick), data-theatre-delay in milliseconds, and data-theatre-duration alongside the data-theatre attribute.

@graph.name: DiviTheatre
@graph.description: A Divi 5 animation plugin that adds Theatre.js-powered cinematic motion to any module via a data-theatre attribute.
